title: P29 active queue mismatch repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
root = Path('governance')
roadmap_queue = root / 'roadmap' / 'ACTIVE_QUEUE.json'
gpt_queue = root / 'ACTIVE_QUEUE.json'
log_path = root / 'logs' / 'execution_log.jsonl'
report_dir = root / 'reports'
state_dir = root / 'state'
roadmap_queue.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
old_roadmap_queue_text = roadmap_queue.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if roadmap_queue.exists() else ''
gpt_queue_text = gpt_queue.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if gpt_queue.exists() else ''
log_text = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if log_path.exists() else ''
queue_obj = {
  'version': 2,
  'updated_at': '2026-06-04T11:30:00Z',
  'source': 'Updated Roadmap / Claude audit pre-KZ-1 block',
  'max_active_tasks': 7,
  'policy': {
    'source_of_next_task': 'first task with status PENDING in governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json',
    'workflow_yml_locked_for_gpt': True,
    'do_not_invent_tasks_when_empty': True,
    'write_execution_log_after_status': True,
    'deprecated_duplicate_queue': 'governance/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was used by GPT in P26-P28 and must not be the canonical queue'
  },
  'tasks': [
    {'id':'RM-01','title':'Отозвать ложный PASS из BEM1284_MINIMAL_GOVERNANCE_LOOP_GATE2.md','status':'PENDING','priority':1,'depends_on':[],'criteria':'False PASS revoked in gate report/state; release_pass=false until evidence is corrected','touch_workflows':False},
    {'id':'RM-02','title':'Fail-closed для усечённых .py (len < 50 байт → BLOCKED)','status':'WAITING_DEPENDS','priority':2,'depends_on':['RM-01'],'criteria':'Python runner/file validation blocks truncated .py files shorter than 50 bytes','touch_workflows':False},
    {'id':'RM-03','title':'ast.parse gate перед фиксацией STUB_RUNNABLE','status':'WAITING_DEPENDS','priority':3,'depends_on':['RM-01','RM-02'],'criteria':'STUB_RUNNABLE can be recorded only after ast.parse succeeds','touch_workflows':False},
    {'id':'RM-04','title':'Консистентность PASS/диагноза','status':'WAITING_DEPENDS','priority':4,'depends_on':['RM-01','RM-02','RM-03'],'criteria':'PASS state and diagnostic reports are consistent and SHA-backed','touch_workflows':False},
    {'id':'RM-05','title':'KZ-1 runners skeleton repair','status':'WAITING_DEPENDS','priority':5,'depends_on':['RM-01','RM-02','RM-03','RM-04'],'criteria':'KZ-1 starts only after RM-01..RM-04 are DONE','touch_workflows':False}
  ]
}
roadmap_queue.write_text(json.dumps(queue_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(roadmap_queue))
log_lines = [line for line in log_text.splitlines() if line.strip()]
p26_p28_lines = [line for line in log_lines if '"id": "P26"' in line or '"id":"P26"' in line or '"id": "P26B"' in line or '"id":"P26B"' in line or '"id": "P27"' in line or '"id":"P27"' in line or '"id": "P27B"' in line or '"id":"P27B"' in line or '"id": "P28"' in line or '"id":"P28"' in line or '"id": "P28B"' in line or '"id":"P28B"' in line]
audit = {
  'id': 'P29',
  'trace_id': 'p29_active_queue_mismatch_repair',
  'status': 'completed',
  'release_pass': False,
  'canonical_queue_repaired': str(roadmap_queue),
  'gpt_p26_p28_queue_path': str(gpt_queue),
  'gpt_queue_exists': gpt_queue.exists(),
  'roadmap_queue_existed_before': bool(old_roadmap_queue_text),
  'execution_log_path': str(log_path),
  'execution_log_exists': log_path.exists(),
  'p26_p28_log_line_count': len(p26_p28_lines),
  'workflow_files_touched': False,
  'next': 'RM-01 revoke false PASS from BEM1284 gate2'
}
state = state_dir / 'P29_ACTIVE_QUEUE_MISMATCH_REPAIR.json'
state.write_text(json.dumps(audit, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = report_dir / 'P29_ACTIVE_QUEUE_MISMATCH_REPAIR.md'
report.write_text('# P29 | ACTIVE_QUEUE mismatch repair\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\n## Finding\nClaude audit is correct: GPT used `governance/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json` during P26-P28, while the canonical roadmap queue is `governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json`.\n\n## Repair\n`governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json` was replaced with the Updated Roadmap pre-KZ-1 order: RM-01, RM-02, RM-03, RM-04, RM-05. RM-01 is PENDING; RM-02..RM-05 wait on dependencies.\n\n## Duplicate queue location\nGPT P26-P28 queue path: `governance/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json`. This is not the canonical queue after this repair.\n\n## execution_log check\n`governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl` exists: ' + str(log_path.exists()) + '\nP26-P28 matching log lines found: ' + str(len(p26_p28_lines)) + '\n\n## Workflow lock\nRespected. No `.github/workflows/*.yml` files touched.\n\n## Next\nRM-01: revoke false PASS from `BEM1284_MINIMAL_GOVERNANCE_LOOP_GATE2.md`.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
